title: Prestige Estates is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Prestige Estates is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Prestige Estates are looking for an experienced Senior Property Advisor based out of Nashik. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Prestige Estates:
Prestige Estates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in GIS Tools

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Prestige Estates!
